title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Akzo Nobel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Akzo Nobel India
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
